LanguageData.Structure_TheCity.label: the City
LanguageData.Structure_TheCity.description: An immeasurable city, ruled by megacorporations. Each district is the size of a country and is led by a Wing — an overpowered corporation mastering a near-supernatural technology, the Singularity. There is one district per letter of the alphabet. The three most powerful Wings are The Head (district A), which decrees and enforces the City's rules, The Eyes (district B) and The Claw (district C). It is The Head that orders Sweepers to clean the Backstreets during the Night.
LanguageData.PM_Meme_Sweeper.label: sweeper
LanguageData.PM_Meme_Sweeper.description: Sweepers see themselves as the cleaners of the Backstreets. When night comes, everything becomes trash to be swept. They live in the shadows, despise filth, and form metaphorical "families" bound by community rather than blood.
